item.name: POST /events/sensor - missing token is rejected on real service

exec: pm.test('Skipped on mock: Prism does not enforce real auth', function () { pm.expect(true).to.eql(true); });
pm.test('Missing token returns 401 or 403', function () { pm.expect([401, 403]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

item.name: POST /events/sensor - invalid token is rejected on real service

exec: pm.test('Skipped on mock: invalid token requires real auth middleware', function () { pm.expect(true).to.eql(true); });
pm.test('Invalid token returns 401 or 403', function () { pm.expect([401, 403]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
